issue.title: Document typed JSON and Unknown boundary rule

artifacts.role: root agent rule preferring typed JSON models/codecs before Unknown or Dynamic-backed wrappers
durable operating guidance for JSON, Unknown-like values, allowed operations, containment, and replacement ownership

validation_result.typed_json_rule: Prefer domain typedefs/enums plus decoders, generated or macro-backed codecs, or recursive typed JSON values before Unknown/Dynamic wrappers.
validation_result.unknown_boundary_rule: Unknown-like JSON boundaries must document why stronger typing is not practical yet, allowed operations, containment, and a Beads/schema/fixture/owner replacement path.
